title: mentha clinopodiifolia
intro: Mentha clinopodiifolia, also known as Pineapple Mint or Pineapple Geranium Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the Himalayas and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is valued for its health benefits, which include alleviating digestive issues, reducing fever, and providing relief from headaches and respiratory problems. Mentha clinopodiifolia can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
